tests.ownerVoiceSample: How ya going, just keeping things simple and helping people understand what matters before it becomes a bigger problem.
tests.misunderstandingOrContext: Watch for unsupported claims around emergency care, advanced treatments, personalised care, latest technology unless the website proves it.

tests.founderGoal: Build more trust with local pet owners

tests.misunderstandingOrContext: Watch for inflated claims like best vet, emergency service, specialist care, or guaranteed outcomes.
